subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! My pen is rushing like a phoenix, but to what avail? For after all that rushing, it hath become fatigued and drained of ability
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله قلم چون سمند در جولانست ولی چه فائده که از کثرت جولان خسته و بی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the power of words; of speech
